g.text: AA3: Human-only vs agent-executable steps across all processes
Question: Which process steps may an agent execute autonomously, and which
MUST be performed by a human? (false = human-only)
Returns: process step, automatable flag, step label
P2-SE3a — Quarantine Door and Request Replacement
P5-S6 — Scene Cleared and Certified Safe
P6-SE3a — Dismissal Escalation to Chief People
P7-SE3a — Pilot Abort on Negative Yield
SE8b — Station Paused — Below Laugh Threshold
P6-S2 — Benchmark Against Laugh Floor Leaderboard
P7-S2 — Pilot Setup on Laugh Floor
P7-S4 — Yield Delta Measurement and R&D Feedback
S6 — Extract Energy and Log EnergyUnit
S9 — Close Shift and Create Performance Records
